title: Drill Log Selection and Transfer Engine
notes: The Drill Log now has the same Edit Holes selection and transfer workflow as the Shot Diagram.
Individual holes, rows, columns, and every saved hole on the active page can be selected.
Selected Drill Log holes can be shifted, copied, cut, and pasted across page boundaries, with neighboring pages created automatically when needed.
Copy excludes GPS coordinates; cut and shift move GPS coordinates with the hole while resetting only the visual callout position.
Occupied destinations require explicit replacement confirmation, and the last ten Drill Log edit operations can be undone.
The m39.1 embedded Drill Log template repair and all working m39.0 Shot Diagram editing features remain included.
